narrative_text: They push open the gate and find an old greenhouse covered in vines. Inside, dozens of fireflies fill the air with soft golden light. The glass walls are cracked. Strange plants with big leaves grow everywhere. The first firefly lands on the boy's hand.
scene_description: The chest has been opened, revealing a glowing golden map that illuminates the children's faces. The girl reaches for the shimmering parchment while the boy looks on in pure amazement, his flashlight forgotten in his hand. The scene is bathed in a magical golden hue that contrasts sharply with the cool moonlight and the dark garden shadows.

properties.distinctive_features: silver flashlight held in his right hand

entities.pose: standing with knees slightly bent and mouth wide open in surprise

properties.distinctive_features: a long green scarf fluttering slightly

entities.pose: leaning forward with both hands grasping the edges of a parchment

properties.distinctive_features: deep purple velvet lining inside the lid

entities.pose: sitting wide open with the lid tilted back against the tree trunk

properties.distinctive_features: bright golden light radiating from the center

entities.pose: unrolled and floating slightly above the velvet interior of the chest
perched with head tilted and wings tucked tightly

title: The Greenhouse
